entries.message: Probe was unavailable; classification is inconclusive until a rerun captures it.
blockedReasons: Probe evidence is incomplete; this entry needs a bounded rerun before triage.

boundary: Error classifications are evidence inputs, not trusted truth, and remain evidence and backlog inputs only until reviewed. No auto-fix, no auto-apply, and no production safety guarantee; outputs are review-gated. Browser read-only or draft-only.
